channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Is Thailand-based ⁠OBON ⁠Corp really 'Company-1', and were Nvidia chips sent to Alibaba? US probe tracks alleged AI server smuggling route

item.title: What triggered Cloudflare job cuts? #tech
item.description: Why Cloudflare is cutting about 1,100 jobs Cloudflare plans to cut about 1,100 staff, citing changes in how it is using AI now and plans to use AI in the future. The decision was described as shifting work toward an “agentic AI first operating model,” with ro… [ServiceNow]

item.title: Microchip Technology Announces Financial Results for Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2026
item.description: For the quarter ended March 31, 2026 Net sales of $1.311 billion, increased 35.1% from the year ago quarter and up 10.6% sequentially.

item.title: The billionaire escape plan: The secret doomsday bunkers of tech elites
